scripts.fixtures: PYTHON_BIN=${PYTHON:-$(if [ -x ../../.venv/bin/python ]; then printf ../../.venv/bin/python; else printf python; fi)}; PYTHONPATH=../../src "$PYTHON_BIN" -m rl_fzerox.core.manager.fixtures.web
scripts.sync-fixtures: npm run fixtures && biome format --write src/test/generated/manager-fixtures.json
scripts.build: npm run sync-fixtures && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.format: biome format --write src index.html vite.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.biome-check: biome check src index.html vite.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.check: npm run check-fixtures && tsc -b && biome check src index.html vite.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json
